description: The VideoPlayerInterface component is a favoritable item that is used to specify the UI elements of a custom Video Player.

fields.ItemName: The name of this favoritable item.
fields.SpawningUser: The user that spawned this favoritable item.
fields.SpawningUserID: The field containing the ID of the user that spawned this favoritable item.
fields.IsInstance: Whether this item is an instance.
fields.URL: The field to fill with the URL of the imported video asset.
fields.Stream: The field to fill with whether this video player is showing stream.
fields.VideoClip: The field to fill with what the video being displayed is.
fields.VideoClipTexture: The field to fill (Usually a material texture field) with the showing video texture.
fields.AspectRatio: The field to fill with what the video's aspect ratio is.
fields.DefaultVideoClip: The default video texture to use if one isn't filled in.
fields.StereoRenderingEnabled: The field to fill with whether the video is a stero video (3D)
fields.StereoLayout: The field to fill with the kind of stero image layout the image has.
fields.StereoTransformLeft: The field to fill with what the rectangle area for the left eye should be.
fields.StereoTransformRight: The field to fill with what the rectangle area for the right eye should be.
fields.StereoTransformScaleLeft: The field to fill with what the UV scale for the left eye should be.
fields.StereoTransformOffsetLeft: The field to fill with what the UV offset for the left eye should be.
fields.StereoTransformScaleRight: The field to fill with what the UV scale for the right eye should be.
fields.StereoTransformOffsetRight: The field to fill with what the UV offset for the right eye should be.
fields.PanoramicRenderingEnabled: The field to fill with whether the video is a 360 video
fields.PanoramicHorizontalFOV: The field to fill with the video's horizontal 360 video FOV.
fields.PanoramicVerticalFOV: The field to fill with the video's vertical 360 video FOV.
fields.PanoramicProjection: The field to fill with what the video's panoramic texture arrangement is.

usage: Use either the existing Resonite video player under Resonite Essentials or make a UI by attaching the component and making one from scratch. Then save the item with this component to the inventory and favorite it so it becomes the default player upon restarting.
